schema.description: Applies a calibration recommendation as a new immutable condition version. rebind_tasks is NOT a field on this request — rebinding is always a separate explicit caller action via PATCH /tasks/{id}. threshold is NOT a field — use calibration_token from the calibrate response; params are resolved server-side from the token.
schema.x-ts-note: SDK ApplyCalibrationParams must only expose calibrationToken and newVersion. Do NOT expose rebindTasks or threshold in the public SDK interface.

calibration_token.description: Token returned by POST /conditions/calibrate. Single-use, expires 24h.

new_version.description: Optional explicit version string for the new condition version. Auto-incremented if not provided.

schema.title: ApplyCalibrationRequest
